hero.headline: Your Dream Outdoor Space Built to Last
hero.subheadline: For over 25 years, Atlanta Porch & Patio has designed and built extraordinary outdoor living spaces for Metro Atlanta's finest homes. Licensed craftsmanship that exceeds Georgia building code standards.
checkmarks: Licensed Georgia contractor with transparent pricing
Serving Buckhead, Milton, Alpharetta & Metro Atlanta

services.headline: Custom Outdoor Living Solutions
services.subtitle: From stunning decks to complete outdoor kitchens, we design and build spaces where your family creates lasting memories.

cards.title: Custom Decks
cards.description: Two-story and single-level decks in premium composite or natural wood, engineered to exceed Georgia building standards.

cards.title: Screened Porches
cards.description: Three-season and screened porches that extend your living space while keeping Atlanta's humidity and bugs at bay.

cards.title: Outdoor Kitchens
cards.description: Fully functional cooking and entertaining spaces designed around how your family actually lives and hosts.

cards.title: Patios & Stone Pavers
cards.description: Custom patio designs with professional masonry and stone paver installation for timeless curb appeal.

cards.title: Sunrooms
cards.description: Enclosed additions that bring the outdoors in, providing year-round enjoyment regardless of weather.

cards.title: Outdoor Fireplaces
cards.description: Custom-built fireplaces that become the stunning focal point of your outdoor living area.

how_it_works.headline: From Vision to Reality in Three Steps

steps.title: Design Consultation
steps.description: We visit your home, listen to your vision, and create a detailed design plan with transparent pricing — no surprises.

steps.title: Expert Construction
steps.description: Our licensed team builds your project with premium materials, clear timelines, and ongoing communication throughout.

steps.title: Live Outdoors
steps.description: Walk into your finished space, built to exceed code and crafted to be enjoyed for decades to come.

about.label: About Atlanta Porch & Patio
about.headline: 25 Years of Craftsmanship Atlanta Families Trust
about.description: Since 2001, we've been transforming Metro Atlanta backyards into extraordinary outdoor living spaces. Our licensed team combines timeless design with expert craftsmanship, using both composite and natural wood materials to bring your vision to life. From Buckhead estates to Alpharetta family homes, we deliver transparent communication and builds that exceed Georgia building code.

features.title: Full Design-Build Service
features.description: From initial concept through final walkthrough, our team handles every detail of your outdoor living project.

features.title: Premium Material Expertise
features.description: We work with composite decking, Brazilian hardwoods, natural stone, and masonry — choosing the right material for your project.

features.title: Exceeds Building Code
features.description: Every structure we build is engineered to exceed Georgia building code standards, giving you peace of mind for decades.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing, No Surprises
pricing.subtitle: Every project includes a detailed scope of work and fixed pricing. Request your free design consultation to get a custom quote for your outdoor space.

guarantee.headline: Our Craftsmanship Promise
guarantee.description: Every Atlanta Porch & Patio project is built by our licensed team to exceed Georgia building code standards. We stand behind our work with transparent communication from the first consultation through final walkthrough — and beyond. Your satisfaction is the foundation of our 25-year reputation.

faqs.question: How long does a typical deck or porch project take?
faqs.answer: Most projects take 4-8 weeks from start to finish, depending on scope and complexity. During your design consultation, we'll provide a detailed timeline so you know exactly what to expect at every stage.

faqs.question: Do you use composite or natural wood materials?
faqs.answer: We're experts in both. We'll discuss the pros and cons of composite decking and premium hardwoods like Brazilian Ipe during your consultation, helping you choose the best material for your lifestyle and budget.

faqs.question: What areas of Atlanta do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve the greater Metro Atlanta area including Buckhead, Milton, Alpharetta, Druid Hills, Norcross, Old Fourth Ward, Marietta, and surrounding communities.

faqs.question: Are you licensed and insured?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We are a licensed Georgia contractor with BBB A+ accreditation. Every project is built to exceed Georgia building code standards, and we carry full insurance for your protection.

faqs.question: What does the design consultation include?
faqs.answer: We visit your property, discuss your vision, assess the site, and develop a detailed design plan with transparent, fixed pricing. There's no obligation — just a clear picture of what's possible for your outdoor space.

testimonials.name: T.Z.
testimonials.text: I would HIGHLY recommend Atlanta Porch and Patio. Great Quality, Great Value, Great People, High Standards!

testimonials.name: Sarah M.
testimonials.text: I partnered with Atlanta Porch and Patio to bring my dream screened porch to life, and the final result is exactly what I had envisioned. The design is stunning, and the craftsmanship is top-notch.

testimonials.name: David R.
testimonials.text: They took our basic ideas and consulted on how we could maximize the functionality of the space. We are impressed with the craftsmanship and the attention to detail that created a space we enjoy for years to come.

contact.headline: Ready to Transform Your Outdoor Space?
contact.subtitle: Schedule your free design consultation and take the first step toward the outdoor living area you've always wanted.
benefits: Transparent fixed pricing with no surprises
